label: Strategy Builder
description: Futures calendar spreads and multi-leg options combo builder with payoff diagram preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates to FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel which import from mocks internally — panel-level mock usage logged as L1 open finding. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock. 0.7: When !isCrypto and strategiesMode==='futures-spreads', Futures Spreads button is disabled and OptionsCombosPanel renders (no empty state needed). FuturesSpreadsTab renders a full matrix always. OptionsCombosPanel always renders combo selectors. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); no async error path. 0.9: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

l0.notes: 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates to FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel which import from mocks internally — panel-level mock usage logged as L1 open finding. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock. 0.7: When !isCrypto and strategiesMode==='futures-spreads', Futures Spreads button is disabled and OptionsCombosPanel renders (no empty state needed). FuturesSpreadsTab renders a full matrix always. OptionsCombosPanel always renders combo selectors. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); no async error path. 0.9: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

1.1.note: Widget reads strategiesMode, setStrategiesMode, isCrypto, asset, setSelectedInstrument, setSelectedFuture via useOptionsData() hook exclusively. FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel re-derive their own data from mocks but that is panel-layer behaviour; widget file is clean. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3: Org filter scopes watchlists; strategies asset (BTC/ETH) is user-selected and not org-filtered. 1.4: clientIds not applicable — strategy builder is asset-scoped. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable — builder lets user construct new strategies. 1.6: Empty organizationIds returns full watchlist scope. 1.7: COMBO_TYPES, CALENDAR_EXPIRIES, generateSpreadMatrix, SPREAD_EXPIRIES in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — should move config constants to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads strategiesMode, setStrategiesMode, isCrypto, asset, setSelectedInstrument, setSelectedFuture via useOptionsData() hook exclusively. FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel re-derive their own data from mocks but that is panel-layer behaviour; widget file is clean. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3: Org filter scopes watchlists; strategies asset (BTC/ETH) is user-selected and not org-filtered. 1.4: clientIds not applicable — strategy builder is asset-scoped. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable — builder lets user construct new strategies. 1.6: Empty organizationIds returns full watchlist scope. 1.7: COMBO_TYPES, CALENDAR_EXPIRIES, generateSpreadMatrix, SPREAD_EXPIRIES in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — should move config constants to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: FuturesSpreadsTab and OptionsCombosPanel import spread matrix generators and combo types directly from lib/mocks/fixtures — these should be injected via context props in a future refactor.
COMBO_TYPES and CALENDAR_EXPIRIES config constants live in lib/mocks/fixtures — should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.

findings.description: 1.7 — COMBO_TYPES, CALENDAR_EXPIRIES, generateSpreadMatrix, SPREAD_EXPIRIES used by panel sub-components live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock rather than lib/config/. Open for future config extraction.
